channel.title: AI Builder's Field Guide — Recently Added
channel.description: A daily-curated wiki of the tools, models, and patterns that AI power-users and builders actually reach for.

item.title: Heron
item.description: An open-source passive network analyzer and AI agent auditor that uses eBPF to observe TLS-encrypted LLM calls and reconstruct agent activity. — It provides deep observability into AI agent behavior and LLM traffic at the network level, allowing debugging and verification without modifying agent code or introducing proxies.

item.title: Eve (Vercel)
item.description: Eve is an open-source TypeScript framework for building, deploying, and operating durable AI agents with a filesystem-first architecture. — It offers a streamlined, Vercel-native approach to agent development, simplifying deployment and integrating core capabilities through a file-based structure, distinguishing it from general-purpose frameworks.

item.title: OpenKnowledge
item.description: OpenKnowledge is an open-source markdown editor that integrates directly with AI coding agents like Claude and Codex, available as a MacOS app or web UI. — It offers a Notion-like experience for collaborative markdown editing with built-in AI agent support, contrasting with existing editors that often require community plugins for deep AI integration.

item.title: Mindstone Rebel
item.description: Mindstone Rebel is a desktop AI workspace that unifies agent memory, files, meetings, and tools to facilitate agentic workflows. — It provides a comprehensive environment for orchestrating AI agents across various data sources and tools, offering a more integrated approach compared to fragmented agent development.

item.title: Claude Opus 4.8
item.description: Anthropic released Claude Opus 4.8, its most capable publicly available model, offering improved performance in coding, agentic skills, and long-horizon reasoning. — This model provides enhanced capabilities for complex tasks and agentic workflows, setting a new benchmark for frontier models available through the Claude API.

item.title: Kimi K2.6
item.description: Kimi K2.6 is an open-source, multimodal agentic model from Moonshot AI, excelling in long-horizon coding, coding-driven design, and orchestrating large agent swarms. — This model pushes the boundaries for open-weight capabilities in complex, multi-step coding and agentic tasks, offering advanced features comparable to some closed-source frontier models.

item.title: Whacka
item.description: Whacka is a mobile-first AI app builder that generates functional progressive web apps from natural language prompts, enabling fast creation and sharing. — Unlike many AI app builders that often target desktop workflows or larger enterprise applications, Whacka focuses on phone-native creation of small, focused utilities for rapid deployment and sharing.

item.title: Perplexity Computer
item.description: Perplexity Computer is a multi-model AI system that unifies frontier models to create and execute complex, long-running workflows. — Unlike traditional chatbots or single-task agents, it orchestrates specialized AI models to handle entire projects, providing a comprehensive solution for complex automation.
